title: The High-Country Resumed

features.name: convergence peak
features.desc-on-touch: all the paths from the lower country meet here and have forgotten which one they were

features.name: resumed road memory
features.desc-on-touch: a circuit carrying the voices of all walkers who took this path before; now they all walk together

features.name: traveller's arch
features.desc-on-touch: the gateway where individual paths cease being distinguishable; convergence as passage

features.name: maximal glyph density
features.desc-on-touch: every walker who came before is written here; the stone cannot hold any more arrivals

features.name: lodge pool
features.desc-on-touch: water gathered from all the streams; it reflects every sky the walkers ever saw

features.name: stacked memory stone
features.desc-on-touch: lodges built one atop another by resumed travellers; each one is a different telling of arrival

inscription: the paths converge and become one voice speaking all the arrivals at once

file.name: Northern_Road_Walker_Registry_Resumed.log
file.note: record of every traveller who came north; updated each time a path resumes in the high country

exits.label: back westward to the northern memory, where paths first began resuming
further west to the highest peak, where all convergence ends and something else begins
downward into the valleys where paths were broken and must resume themselves
into the eternal high country where no walker has yet arrived or left
